/.title: Tideframe Labs — Independent Mac software
/.description: Tideframe Labs is an independent Mac software studio in Vermont and the maker of Modeboard.

/products.title: Products — Tideframe Labs
/products.description: Mac software from Tideframe Labs, an independent studio based in Vermont.

/modeboard.title: Modeboard — One profile. Your whole Mac, ready.
/modeboard.description: Create Mac profiles for wallpaper, Dock, appearance, menu bar, and Desktop settings, then apply them manually, from the menu bar, with Apple Shortcuts, or through a Focus Filter.

/privacy.title: Privacy Policy — Tideframe Labs
/privacy.description: Modeboard keeps profiles and backups on your Mac, with no account, analytics, advertising, or tracking.

/terms.title: Software Terms — Tideframe Labs
/terms.description: Current website and pre-release software terms for Tideframe Labs and Modeboard.

/support.title: How can we help? — Tideframe Labs
/support.description: Modeboard support for installation, permissions, backups, diagnostics, updates, and contact.

/about.description: Tideframe Labs is a software studio founded by Ivan Minier.
